description: Learn how to build scalable applications using Supabase, a Postgres development platform that provides a suite of tools for building robust and secure applications.

lessons.title: What is Supabase?
lessons.description: Introduction to Supabase, its features, and benefits

lessons.title: Setting up a Supabase Project
lessons.description: Step-by-step guide to setting up a new Supabase project

lessons.title: Postgres Database
lessons.description: Understanding the Postgres database in Supabase, including data modeling and schema design

lessons.title: Authentication and Authorization
lessons.description: Implementing user authentication and authorization using Supabase's built-in auth features

lessons.title: Edge Functions
lessons.description: Building serverless functions using Supabase Edge Functions

lessons.title: Realtime Data Synchronization
lessons.description: Implementing real-time data synchronization using Supabase's Realtime features

lessons.title: Vector Embeddings and Machine Learning
lessons.description: Using Supabase's vector embeddings and machine learning capabilities to build intelligent applications

lessons.title: Building a User Management System
lessons.description: Step-by-step guide to building a user management system using Supabase

lessons.title: Integrating Supabase with Other Tools and Services
lessons.description: Integrating Supabase with popular frameworks and libraries, such as Next.js and React
